metadata.title: Premium Banking | Debit Cards | Card Banking | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Premium Banking is a prestigious way of Islamic banking specially designed to meet your financial needs. Experience your banking needs with our Premium Banking services and value-added benefits available to you from our personalized and free banking services to customary discounts and privileges tailored to your lifestyle at finest retail outlets, restaurants and hotels across the country.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Premium Banking For a World of Convenience and Luxury Premium Services Experience Luxury Like Never Before with MEEZAN WORLD DEBIT CARD Learn More If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Discover an Extraordinary Class of Islamic Banking Meezan Premium Banking Fatwa Meezan Premium Banking is a prestigious way of Islamic banking specially designed to meet your financial needs. Experience your banking needs with our Premium Banking services and value added benefits available to you from our personalized and free banking services to customary discounts and privileges tailored to your lifestyle at finest retail outlets, restaurants and hotels across the country. A prestigious banking relationship that is based on our three pillars of commitment Exceptional Service We understand your banking needs and are committed to deliver you exceptional level of service and attention that is both exclusive and responsive Shariah-compliant Solutions We offer you a suite of world class Shariah-compliant financial solutions that address all your priorities from value added products and services, exclusive banking channels to lifestyle privileges Recognition of Banking Relationship We recognize your relationship with us, and rewarding it with exclusive benefits meet your financial needs Premium Benefits & Privileges Take a look at Premium Banking offers by downloading our catalogue. Click here for details As our Premium Banking customer, you enjoy exclusive Benefits and Privileges. Due to your Premium relationship status with the Bank, these benefits and privileges are also offered to your joint account-holders. Like you, they also enjoy the Premium Banking Benefits with us. World Mastercard Debit Card Free for Premium customers maintaining criteria Access to 900+ airport lounges worldwide Daily spending limits: Meezan Bank and Other Bank* ATM Cash Withdrawal Rs. 500,000 POS & E-Commerce Rs. 3,000,000 Internal Funds Transfer Rs. 3,000,000 Inter Bank Funds Transfer (IBFT) Rs. 3,000,000 RAAST Transfer Rs. 3,000,000 RAAST (IBFT) Rs. 3,000,000 *Subject to withdrawal limits of respective 1link member banks Learn More Platinum for Premium customers Access to 25+ Cash Withdrawal Rs. 400,000 & E-Commerce Rs. 1,000,000 Funds Transfer Rs. 2,500,000 Transfer (IBFT) Rs. 2,500,000 Transfer Rs. 2,500,000 (IBFT) Rs. 2,500,000 1link member banks Fee Waivers Avail fee waivers on the following transactions: Cheque stop payment Locker annual fee Issuance of Bank Certificate waived for Premium* Customers) Secured Transaction Register (STR) Fee Rs. 1,000 Documentation Charges At actual *Having spent 6 months as Premium customer For more details, Please Visit CIP Lounges Karachi Lounge Name : CIP Lounge - Jinnah Terminal Complex Access : Cardholder, 1 guest and 2 children upto age of 12 years Lahore CIP Lounge - Allama Iqbal Terminal of 12 years Multan : CIP Lounge – near Security Check counters of 12 years Sialkot : CIP Lounge of 12 years Dubai Lounge Name : Marhaba Lounge - Terminal 1, 2, 3 and C1 Access : Cardholder only Abu Dhabi Lounge Name : Mastercard Diamond Lounge - VIP Terminal : Cardholder only Jeddah Lounge Name : First Class Lounge - North : Cardholder only Cairo Class Lounge - Terminal 1 and 3 : Cardholder only Kuwait Name : Mastercard Pearl Metro Lounge : Cardholder only Amman Lounge Name : Petra VIP : Cardholder only Complimentary Access to Airport Lounges Get Complimentary access to more than 1200 airport lounges worldwide on our Mastercard Platinum and World debit card List of Mastercard Debit Card Lounges List of Debit Card Lounges Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Download the Mastercard Airport Pass MEA app on iOS and Android. For more information, please Click here Note: It is compulsory to carry out atleast (equivalent) USD 1 international transaction, prior to getting access to the current lounge/dining limits, mentioned in FAQ’s. Some of these airports include: ABU DHABI (AUH) Airport Name: Abu Dhabi International Airport Lounges Name: Diamond Lounge Terminal: VIP Terminal. Access: Please show the 16-digit membership number or QR code generated via Airport Pass MEA App to the lounge staff to get free access. Free access is for cardholders only. Any guest accompanying the cardholder shall be charged by the lounge. To avoid any inconvenience please always carry your Meezan Mastercard Platinum Debit Card with you when availing lounge access. AMMAN (AMM) Airport Name: Queen Alia International Lounge Name: Crown Lounge (Royal Jordanian) Terminal: Main Terminal availing lounge access. AMSTERDAM (AMS) Airport Name: Amsterdam Schiphol Lounges Name: Aspire Lounge (No.41) Terminal 3: Terminal 3. availing lounge access. BANGKOK (BKK) Airport Name: Bangkok Suvarnabhumi Intl Lounges Name: Miracle First Class Lounge Terminal: International Concourse G availing lounge access. BARCELONA (BCN) Airport Name: Barcelona El Prat Lounges Name: Sala VIP Miro Terminal: Terminal 1. availing lounge access. BRUSSELS (BRU) Airport Name: Brussels Diamond Lounge Terminal: Main availing lounge access. CAIRO (CAI) Airport Name: Cairo International Lounges Name: Class Lounge Terminal: Terminal 2 & availing lounge access. CASABLANCA (CMN) Airport Name: Casablanca Mohammed V Intl Lounges Name: Pearl Lounge (Departures) Terminal: Terminal 2. availing lounge access. DUBAI (DWC) Airport Name: Dubai Al Maktoum Intl Lounge Name: Marhaba Lounge Terminal: Terminal 2. Airport Name: Dubai Lounge Terminal: Terminal 1 Concourse D Terminal 3 Concourse A Terminal 3 Concourse B Terminal 3 Concourse C availing lounge access. FRANKFURT (FRA) Airport Name: Frankfurt Main Lounges Name: Sky availing lounge access. HONG KONG SAR (HKG) Airport Name: Hong Kong Chek Lap Kok Intl Lounges Name: Plaza Premium Lounge availing lounge access. ISLAMABAD (ISD) Airport Name: Islamabad Airport Lounges Name: Airline CIP Lounge International Terminal: Airside - International Departures. After Immigration Control and ASF Search Area, the lounge is located upstairs next to the stairs in the main departure lounge. Access: Show your Platinum Debit Card at the participating lounge to gain complimentary access when travelling internationally. Free access available to cardholder only. (The card may get charged for up to Rs. 1.5 for the complimentary access) ISTANBUL (IST) Airport Name: Istanbul Ataturk Lounges Name: IGA Lounge Terminal: International availing lounge access. JEDDAH (JED) Airport Name: Jeddah King A Aziz Intl Class Lounge Terminal: North availing lounge access. KARACHI (KHI) Airport Name: Karachi International Lounges Name: CIP Lounge, Jinnah Terminal Complex Terminal: Jinnah Terminal Complex the complimentary access) KUALA LUMPUR (KUL) Airport Name: Kuala Lumpur Premium Lounge Terminal: KLIA1 (Satellite) availing lounge access. KUWAIT (KWI) Airport Name: Kuwait International Lounges Name: Dasman Premier Lounge Terminal: Terminal M availing lounge access. LAHORE (LHE) Airport Name: Lahore Allama Iqbal Intl Name: CIP Lounge, Allama Iqbal Terminal: Allama Iqbal the complimentary access) LONDON (LHR) Airport Name: London Heathrow Lounges Name: Aspire, The Lounge at LHR T5 Terminal: Terminal 5 availing lounge access. MULTAN (MUX) Airport Name: Multan Lounges Name: CIP Lounge (MUX1) Terminal: MUX1 the complimentary access) NEW YORK (NY) (JFK) Airport Name: New York John F.Kennedy Airport Lounges Name: Air India Maharaja Lounge Terminal: Terminal 4 availing lounge access. PARIS (CDG) Airport Name: Paris-Orly Airport Lounges Name: Icare Lounge Terminal: Orly 1 availing lounge access. ROME (FCO) Airport Name: Rome Fiumicino Lounges Name: Prima Vista Lounge Terminal: Terminal 3 availing lounge access. SIALKOT (SKT) Airport Name: Sialkot Airport Name: CIP Lounge Terminal: International Terminal (inside security). the complimentary access) SINGAPORE (SIN) Airport Name: Singapore Changi Intl Lounges Name: SATS availing lounge access. TORONTO (YYZ) Airport Name: Toronto Lester B. Pearson Plaza Premium Lounge (Int'l Departures) Terminal: Terminal availing lounge access. Show More Dear Customer, to avail complimentary lounge access, please notify the Bank of your travel plan one day prior to the departure date by calling our 24/7 toll free number at 0800-00625 Retail and Dining Discounts Discount ranging 10% to 50% on selected retail outlets and restaurants in major cities. Click here to view more details Premium Service Experience We value your time and have devoted ourselves to provide you with the highest level of service across all our banking channels. Dedicated Relationship Team A dedicated relationship team is assigned to you for managing banking needs and overseeing your financial relationship with the Bank. Relationship Managers and Branch Managers at all our branches and Premium Banking Centers across the country are available to manage your banking needs. The relationship teams are supported by experienced banking professionals that help them serve you better. Exclusive Banking Channels We make your banking experience valuable through the following exclusive banking channels available to our Premium Banking customers only. Premium Phone Banking enables you to consult with our experienced Phone Banking Officers 24/7 to help you with your banking needs on a toll free number 0800-00625 (outside Pakistan +92-21 35839041). Premium Internet Banking offers you convenient access to your bank accounts anytime, any where. Premium SMS Alerts keeps you informed about your banking transactions on your bank accounts. Premium Banking Centers are equipped with all banking capabilities that provide you comfort to easily transact your banking needs. Premium Banking Solutions Our Product Development team and Shariah Supervisory Board have developed a range of financial solutions that cater to your specific requirement. Deposit Solutions Wealth Management Financing Solutions Mutual Funds Business Solutions Premium Banking Criteria Our Premium Banking services are offered exclusively to customers who maintain any of the following quarterly average balance: Account Category Criteria for Individual & Sole Proprietors Criteria for Partnership Entities Criteria for Roshan Digital Account Customer Bank Accounts Equivalent to PKR 3 Million or more Equivalent to PKR 10 Million or more Bank Accounts & Term Deposit Certificates Equivalent to PKR 5 or more Bank Accounts, Term Deposit Certificates & Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificates N/A N/A Million or more Meezan Roshan Apna Ghar (Disbursed Amount) N/A N/A PKR 8 Million or more Note: Partnership Entities will be offered Basic Banking services with limited Premium Banking offerings. In addition, the Partners* will also be able to enjoy all Premium Services on their individual accounts. Terms & Conditions Terms & Conditions: services are offered by the Bank at its sole discretion to customers (including Current and Savings account-holders) who maintain the required criteria. Criteria for Premium Banking services can be changed as per the Bank's discretion. Premium Banking services may be discontinued if the required criteria are not maintained. Subsequently, charges for services shall be levied per the Bank's Schedule of Charges. *Premium Banking can be offered for a maximum of 4 Partners' individual accounts only. Premium Banking Centres Our Banking Centers are specially designed to give you world class banking experience while you your banking needs. Receive Exclusive Service Our staff at the Banking Centers are experienced, equipped with a wealth of knowledge of Islamic financial solutions, and supported by experts to manage your exclusive banking needs. Private Conference Room You can schedule your business meetings in our private conference rooms at our Premium Banking Centers subject to its availability. Wireless Hotspot Stay connected to your email and the internet through our high speed wireless internet hot-spot, available free at Premium Banking Centers. Addresses of Premium Banking Centers Premium Banking Centers Karachi Name : Clifton Branch Address : Shop # 5, 6, Ground Floor, Al-Karam Centre, BC1, Block-7, Main Clifton Road, Clifton, Karachi, Add Space Shop # 4, Plot # BC 2, Block 7 Clifton Phone : +92 (21) 35372060-64 Name : Khayaban-e-Sehar Branch Address : 9-C Shahbaz Commercial Lane No.1, Khayaban-e-Sehar, DHA Phase VI, Karachi : +92 (21) 35349307-13, 35349316-18 Name : Barkat-e-Hyderi Branch Address : D-10, Block-H, Scheme No 2 ,North Nazimabad, : +92 (21) 36705073-159-162-146-194-215 Name : Shaheed-e-Millat Road Branch Address : Plot No.7-A/228, Block-3, Dehli Mercantile Muslim Cooperative Housing Society Ltd, Shaheed-e-Millat Road : +92 (21) 34140151-155 Lahore Name : DHA Y Block Phase III Address : Plot # 97-Y, Phase III Commercial (Opposite Sheba Park) DHA Lahore Phone : +92 (42) 5742582-3 Name : ZahoorElahi Branch Address : Building No.3-A, Block A, Gulberg II, Zahoor Elahi Road, Lahore, Pakistan. : +92 (42) 35987200 Name : Akbar Chowk Address : Plot No.46, Block-10 Sector B-1 Township Lahore. : +92 (42) 35201425-26 Name : Tufail Branch Address : Cantt Shopping Plaza, Main Tufail Road Lahore Cantt. : +92 (42) 36602701-7 Name : Model Town K Block Address : Plot No. 8 & 9 K-Block Commercial Market Model Town : +92 (42) 35915601-03 Islamabad Name : Blue Area : Plot # 37-B, Tahir Plaza, Jinnah Avenue, Blue Area, Islamabad. Phone : +92 (51) 2656501-5 Name : Jinnah Super Branch Address : Q-13 College Road F-7 Markaz, Islamabad, : +92 (51) 35349307-10 Name : Meezan Tower : Plot # 03, Sector G-8/3 : +92 (51) 6135561-63 Rawalpindi Name : DHA Phase I Branch Address : DHA Avenue Mall, Main Boulevard DHA Phase I Rawalpindi : +92 (51) 5788316-7 Name : Chaklala Scheme III Branch Address : 84 Butt Plaza Chaudhary Bostan Khan Road Moza Topi Chaklala Cantt. Rawalpindi. Faisalabad Name : Jail Address : Plot No.17-B, Jail Road, Faisalabad, Phone : +92 (41) 111 852 Sialkot Name : Aziz Shaheed Branch Address : Qayyum Trade Center, Aziz Shaheed Road, Sialkot Cantt, Phone : +92 (52) 111 852 Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Avail our Premium Banking Services Now Fill out the form below and you will be guided about how you can begin your premium experience. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing!
